name: E-10 rule deprecation lifecycle: migrate-rule --dry-run makes no writes per the §2.14 dry-run contract
command: printf 'rules:\n  old-rule: error\n' > p.yaml && before=$(md5sum p.yaml | cut -d' ' -f1) && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/migrate-rule.sh" old-rule --to new-rule --profile p.yaml --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; after=$(md5sum p.yaml | cut -d' ' -f1) && [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ "$before" = "$after" ] && grep -q 'dry-run; would migrate' err.txt && echo dry_run 1>&2
